# Nam Yang Greece

> Traditional Shaolin Kung Fu and Chi Kung training in Corfu, Greece. Retreats, classes and private training taught by Thomas Croc within the Nam Yang tradition, founded by Master Ang Lian Huat in 1954. Based in the coastal village of Arillas on the northwest coast of Corfu.

Nam Yang Greece offers immersive training experiences for complete beginners and experienced practitioners alike. The school teaches a complete traditional system combining external martial skill (Tiger-Crane Kung Fu, Sum Chien) with internal development (Shuang Yang, Chi Kung, Walking Meditation). Training takes place through week-long and two-week retreats in summer, regular weekly classes in Arillas, and one-to-one private sessions year-round.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://crockungfu.com/): Overview of the school, training philosophy, upcoming retreats and student testimonials.
- [Retreats](https://crockungfu.com/retreats.html): Full details of the July (4–11 July, from €600) and September (9–23 September, from €1000) retreats in Corfu, including daily structure, accommodation, practical information and booking.
- [Classes](https://crockungfu.com/classes.html): Weekly classes in Arillas — Yin Practice (Chi Kung, Shuang Yang, Walking Meditation), Yang Practice (Kung Fu, conditioning, partner training) and Children's Classes. Schedules and locations included.
- [Private Training](https://crockungfu.com/private-training.html): One-to-one sessions tailored to individual goals. Available to beginners, experienced practitioners, visitors to Corfu, and small groups or families.
- [The Arts](https://crockungfu.com/arts.html): Detailed introduction to the individual arts of the Nam Yang system — Tong Ling Chi Kung, Shuang Yang, Stretching & Mobility, Vein & Tendon Chi Kung, Sum Chien, Tiger-Crane Combination, and Pushing & Sticky Hands.
- [About Thomas](https://crockungfu.com/about.html): Background and teaching philosophy of Thomas Croc, instructor and founder of Nam Yang Greece.
- [Contact](https://crockungfu.com/contact.html): Contact details — email, phone and WhatsApp. Based in Arillas, Corfu, Greece.
- [Retreat Enquiry](https://crockungfu.com/retreat-enquiry.html): Enquiry form for prospective retreat participants.

## Key Facts

- Instructor: Thomas Croc
- Location: Arillas, Corfu, Greece (northwest coast)
- Tradition: Nam Yang, founded 1954 by Master Ang Lian Huat
- Contact: crockungfu@gmail.com | +33 7 49 08 58 14
- Social: instagram.com/crockungfu | facebook.com/crockungfu
- Retreat dates 2025: July 4–11 | September 9–23
- Languages: English
